title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: Cisco fixed critical and high-severity flaws

sections.executive_summary: This report covers Cisco fixed critical and high-severity flaws - a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P1_CRITICAL. CISA KEV confirms active exploitation. Affected sectors: Cisco.
sections.technical_analysis:
Threat: Cisco fixed critical and high-severity flaws
Risk Score: 10.0/10 | Exploitability: 7.5/10
Attributed Actor: CDB-FIN-09
Attack Vectors: Email - Phishing; Supply Chain - Compromise; Network - Exploit Public-Facing Application
Impact: CATASTROPHIC - Complete system compromise likely

ASSESSMENT: CRITICAL - Immediate defensive action required. Activate IR procedures.
